author: y4rr
content: Five conformance test functions are cascade-skipped because they require live network access to huggingface.co: hf_download_model, search_models, get_model (network path), download_weights (HTTP sub-path), load_pretrained (HTTP sub-path). These are covered by integration tests in tests/load_pretrained_smoke.rs but cannot be exercised offline in the conformance fixture model. To fix: introduce HTTP mocking (e.g. via a mock server or vcr-style recorded fixtures) so conformance tests can exercise the full network path offline. Tests: cascade_skip_hf_download_model, cascade_skip_search_models, cascade_skip_get_model_network, cascade_skip_download_weights_http, cascade_skip_load_pretrained_http in ferrotorch-hub/tests/conformance_hub.rs
